name: @act-spec/example-ecommerce-catalog
description: Tiny Astro storefront fed by a 500-SKU catalog dataset, with ACT generated alongside via the programmatic adapter.
author: Jeremy Forsythe <jeremy@act-spec.org>

scripts.conformance: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:site && pnpm run validate
scripts.test: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-ecommerce-catalog: example exercises end-to-end via conformance')"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-ecommerce-catalog: lint covered by typecheck + conformance')"
